hero.tagline: One Group. One Foundation. Real Solutions.
hero.subtitle: DTR GROUP supports businesses, uplifts communities, and shapes the future through multi-sector solutions.

about.title: About DTR GROUP
about.description: DTR GROUP is both a humanitarian foundation and a multi-sector professional group. Our mission is to provide concrete, lasting solutions to businesses and communities alike.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.desc: We aim for the highest standards in each of our services.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: Transparency and ethics guide all our actions.

impact.title: Impact
impact.desc: We measure our success by the positive change we generate.

foundation.title: The DTR Foundation
foundation.subtitle: Acting for the most vulnerable
foundation.description: The DTR Foundation supports underprivileged children (ages 0–8) and elderly people (65+) through food aid, medical care and daily support.
foundation.children_desc: Food support, access to medical care and educational guidance for street children and those in need.
foundation.elderly_desc: Food assistance, medical care and daily support for seniors in vulnerable situations.

financial.title: Financial Advisory
financial.desc: Financial consulting: analysis, strategy and financial optimization for businesses and individuals.

legal.title: Legal Advisory
legal.desc: Lawyers in Congo and India. International legal assistance for individuals and businesses.

business.title: Business Plans & Management
business.desc: Business plan development, management support and operational management services.

hr.title: Human Resources
hr.desc: HR management: recruitment, training, organization and HR support.

sectors.title: Sectorial Solutions
sectors.subtitle: Expertise at the heart of strategic industries

pharmaceutical.title: Pharmaceutical
pharmaceutical.desc: Wholesale sales of powerful and effective pharmaceutical products.

aviation.title: Aviation
aviation.desc: Aircraft sales for regional travel, charter services and maintenance by our own mechanics.

maritime.title: Maritime
maritime.desc: Boat construction and maintenance, navigation charts and dredging.

agriculture.title: Agriculture
agriculture.desc: Soil analysis and testing, seed planting and agro-technical support.

industry.title: Industry
industry.desc: Industrial solutions tailored to the specific needs of each sector.
